heading: “State” defined
label: 582a–7 “State” defined
text: The term “State” as used in this subchapter shall include Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, and Guam.
notes: Amendments1972— inserted reference to Virgin Islands and Guam.Pub. L. 92–318
